description_long: This house features a modern, symmetrical design with a prominent central entryway flanked by large, rectangular windows. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored materials, with a gently sloping, multi-faceted roof that extends over the main and side wings. The rear of the house showcases a curved, glass-enclosed section supported by columns, suggesting a spacious living or entertainment area with panoramic views. The entryway is elevated with a set of steps leading to double doors, topped by a small balcony and overhang. The windows are expansive and blue-tinted, providing ample natural light to the interior. Architectural details such as the columned rear facade and the clean, geometric lines contribute to a contemporary, upscale appearance.
description: A modern, light-colored house with large blue-tinted windows, a central entryway, and a curved, columned rear facade. The design is symmetrical and features a multi-faceted sloped roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, double doors, a small balcony, and large rectangular windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the extension of the roof, and the large windows along the side wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved, glass-enclosed section supported by columns and a wraparound balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the large windows and the curvature of the rear section.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, double doors, a small balcony above, and a modest overhang
